---
title: "Module 4 — Bayesian Inference"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

<!-- Thin module landing (repo convention: index.qmd is a landing, never a
     lecture deck). Decks live beside it; see CLAUDE.md. -->

Parameters stop being fixed unknowns and become beliefs: prior → likelihood →
posterior. Conjugacy makes the update exact — Beta-Binomial for the hypertension
proportion, then the Gaussian posterior over the regression weights
$\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{w}\mid\mathbf{m}_N, \mathbf{S}_N)$, the closed form where
**Project 1 ends**. Ridge regression returns as MAP with a Gaussian prior.

| Deck | Link |
|------|------|
| Lecture A — Priors, Posteriors & the Beta-Binomial | [m4a-bayes-beta-binomial](m4a-bayes-beta-binomial.html) |
| Lecture B — The Conjugate Gaussian Posterior | [m4b-gaussian-posterior](m4b-gaussian-posterior.html) |

Companion activity: [week03 Bayesian-updating explorer](https://gchism94.github.io/info521-activities-2026/week03-bayesian-updating/)
(embedded live in Lecture A — the slug is week-named; modules ≠ weeks).

[← All slide decks](../../index.html)
